name: Cucumber Cream Cheese Sandwich
description: A cool, no-cook tea sandwich that is perfect for quick demos.

steps.title: Set up the ingredients
steps.instruction: Place two slices of bread, cream cheese, cucumber slices, salt, pepper, and any herbs you want on the counter.
tips: Pat cucumber slices dry so the sandwich stays crisp.

steps.title: Spread the cream cheese
steps.instruction: Spread a generous layer of cream cheese over one side of each slice of bread.
tips: Go all the way to the edges for full coverage.

steps.title: Add the filling
steps.instruction: Arrange cucumber slices in a single layer on one slice, then add a small pinch of salt, pepper, and herbs if using.
tips: Keep the cucumbers in a single layer so the sandwich stays easy to eat.

steps.title: Close and serve
steps.instruction: Top with the second slice of bread, press gently, and cut the sandwich in half.
tips: Wipe the cutting board first for a neat demo presentation.
